message.content: {"items":[{"title":"German Longitudinal Election Study (GLES), Rolling Cross-Section Campaign Survey 2009","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.10188","justification":"Core political science study on German federal election campaigning and voting at the beginning of the 2010s, hosted by GESIS."},{"title":"German Longitudinal Election Study (GLES), Campaign Panel 2009","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.10189","justification":"Panel survey of political attitudes and vote choice around the 2009 Bundestag election; baseline wave for the 2010s election panels, archived at GESIS."},{"title":"German Longitudinal Election Study (GLES), Rolling Cross-Section Campaign Survey 2013","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.12006","justification":"GESIS-hosted rolling cross-section survey for the 2013 Bundestag election, covering political opinions and electoral behavior in Germany in the mid‑2010s."},{"title":"German Longitudinal Election Study (GLES), Campaign Panel 2013","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.12007","justification":"Panel data on German voters’ political attitudes and behavior around the 2013 federal election, archived by GESIS and widely used in political research."},{"title":"German Longitudinal Election Study (GLES), Rolling Cross-Section Campaign Survey 2017","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13226","justification":"GESIS dataset on politics and electoral behavior during the 2017 Bundestag election campaign in Germany, squarely within the 2010s."},{"title":"German Longitudinal Election Study (GLES), Campaign Panel 2017","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13227","justification":"Panel study of German citizens’ political preferences and vote decisions in the 2017 federal election, provided by GESIS."},{"title":"European Election Study 2014, Voter Study – Germany","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.12318","justification":"Country component (Germany) of the 2014 European Election Study, focusing on political attitudes and European Parliament voting; hosted at GESIS."},{"title":"Politbarometer Trend 2010-2013 (Cumulated)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.11665","justification":"Cumulated GESIS Politbarometer data covering recurring political opinion surveys in Germany at the start of the 2010s."},{"title":"Politbarometer Trend 2014-2017 (Cumulated)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.12847","justification":"Cumulated GESIS Politbarometer dataset with German public opinion on parties, politicians, and current politics in the mid‑2010s."},{"title":"German General Social Survey (ALLBUS) 2014","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.12253","justification":"Nationally representative survey of the German population with major modules on political attitudes and behavior in the mid‑2010s, archived at GESIS."}]}
